html:
2026-0269
2026-03-25PMOOther Than Statutory AuthorityOrder establishing the new mandate of Rapid Response Mechanism CanadaOrder establishing the new mandate of Rapid Response Mechanism Canada, a unit within the Department of Foreign Affairs, Trade and Development, in order to outline the duties and manner in which Rapid Response Mechanism Canada addresses foreign information operations, including foreign information manipulation and interference, to uphold that responsibility and provide options for response.N/A
subject: Order establishing the new mandate of Rapid Response Mechanism Canada
precis: Order establishing the new mandate of Rapid Response Mechanism Canada, a unit within the Department of Foreign Affairs, Trade and Development, in order to outline the duties and manner in which Rapid Response Mechanism Canada addresses foreign information operations, including foreign information manipulation and interference, to uphold that responsibility and provide options for response.
